modules.name: Core HR
modules.description: Centralized employee records, org charts, and company directory. Serves as the foundation for all other MapleHR modules.
setupSteps: Configure company profile and legal entities
Define organizational structure and departments
Set up employee record templates and custom fields
Import existing employee data via CSV or HRIS migration
Configure org chart display preferences and access permissions

modules.name: Employee Records
modules.description: Comprehensive employee data management including personal details, employment history, documents, and compliance records. Supports secure document storage and e-signatures.
setupSteps: Define required employee fields and custom attributes
Configure document categories and retention policies
Set up employee self-service portal permissions
Import historical employee documents and records
Enable e-signature workflows for onboarding paperwork

modules.name: Reporting
modules.description: Standard HR reports covering headcount, turnover, demographics, and compliance. Includes scheduled report delivery and export capabilities.
setupSteps: Select and configure default report templates
Define report access permissions by role
Set up scheduled report delivery via email
Configure data filters and saved report views

modules.name: PTO Management
modules.description: Manage paid time off policies, accruals, requests, and approvals. Supports multiple leave types, blackout dates, and team calendar views.
setupSteps: Create PTO policies and accrual rules for each leave type
Configure approval workflows and manager delegation
Set company holidays and blackout dates
Import current employee PTO balances
Enable team calendar and absence notifications

modules.name: Hiring / ATS
modules.description: Applicant tracking system for managing job postings, candidate pipelines, interview scheduling, and offer letters. Integrates with major job boards.
setupSteps: Configure careers page branding and job posting templates
Define hiring pipeline stages and scorecards
Set up interview scheduling and calendar integrations
Connect job board distribution channels
Configure offer letter templates and approval workflows
Define hiring team roles and permissions

modules.name: Time Tracking
modules.description: Track employee hours, manage timesheets, and enforce overtime rules. Supports clock-in/out, project-based tracking, and payroll integration.
setupSteps: Define work schedules, shift patterns, and overtime rules
Configure timesheet approval workflows
Set up clock-in/out methods (web, mobile, kiosk)
Map time entries to projects or cost centers
Configure break and meal period compliance rules

modules.name: Performance Management
modules.description: Run performance review cycles, set and track goals, and collect continuous feedback. Supports 360-degree reviews and calibration sessions.
setupSteps: Design review cycle templates and rating scales
Configure goal-setting frameworks (OKRs, KPIs)
Set up 360-degree feedback and peer review workflows
Define review cycle schedules and notification cadences
Configure calibration session settings and permissions

modules.name: Benefits Administration
modules.description: Manage employee benefits enrollment, carrier connections, and open enrollment periods. Supports medical, dental, vision, life, and voluntary benefits.
setupSteps: Configure benefit plan types and coverage tiers
Connect insurance carriers via EDI feeds or API
Define eligibility rules and waiting periods
Set up open enrollment windows and life event triggers
Build employee-facing benefits selection experience
Test carrier file feeds and confirm data accuracy

modules.name: Advanced Analytics
modules.description: Predictive workforce analytics with custom dashboards, attrition modeling, compensation benchmarking, and DEI insights. Powered by machine learning.
setupSteps: Connect data sources and configure data pipeline refresh schedules
Select and customize analytics dashboard templates
Define key workforce metrics and KPI thresholds
Configure attrition risk model parameters
Set up automated insight alerts and distribution lists

modules.name: Payroll
modules.description: Full-service payroll processing with tax filing, direct deposit, garnishments, and year-end reporting. Supports multi-state and multi-EIN configurations.
setupSteps: Register company tax accounts and EINs by state
Configure pay schedules, pay groups, and earning codes
Set up direct deposit and payment methods
Import employee tax withholding elections (W-4 data)
Define deduction and garnishment rules
Run parallel payroll test cycle to validate calculations

modules.name: EOR / Global Employment
modules.description: Employer of Record service for hiring and paying employees in 100+ countries without establishing local entities. Handles local compliance, contracts, and benefits.
setupSteps: Select target countries and review local employment requirements
Configure country-specific employment contract templates
Set up international payment methods and currency preferences
Define locally compliant benefits and statutory contributions
Establish expense reimbursement policies per country
Complete know-your-customer (KYC) verification

modules.name: Learning Management / Training
modules.description: Create, assign, and track employee training programs and compliance courses. Includes a course library, certification tracking, and learning path management.
setupSteps: Set up course categories and learning path structures
Upload or connect third-party training content libraries
Define mandatory compliance training assignments by role
Configure certification tracking and renewal reminders
Enable manager dashboards for team training progress

modules.name: Candidate Assessments
modules.description: Pre-hire assessment tools including skills tests, cognitive evaluations, and structured interview kits. Requires the Hiring / ATS module to be active.
setupSteps: Select assessment types and test libraries to enable
Map assessments to job roles and hiring pipeline stages
Configure scoring rubrics and pass/fail thresholds
Set up candidate communication templates for assessment invitations
